heading: Messages
intro: One conversation per trading partner. Open a listing or order to message someone new.
threadIntro: Direct line with your trading partner

list.emptyHint: Message a seller from the market or a trading partner from an order.

panel.empty: Start a conversation with your trading partner. You can message before placing an inquiry or order.
panel.viewOnly: View-only: admins can read messages but cannot post here.

toast.attachmentTooBig: Attachment must be 5 MB or smaller.
toast.badAttachmentType: Only images and PDF files are allowed.
